schema_name: Law of Totality Structural Error Audit
formula: ErrΩ(x,F,U) ⇔ LocalClosureF(x) ∧ ActualUseU(F,x) exceeds ValidScope(F,x) ∧ ∃d [CriticalDepΩ(d,x,U) ∧ ExcludedF(d)]
notes: Local closure alone is not error.
The error appears when local closure is exported beyond valid scope.
A missing dependency matters only when critical for the actual use.
The audit is prevention-oriented, not merely explanatory.
